entries.quote: What we did to high forex charges on cards way back in 2018 by introducing 'zero forex' cards, we will do the same to high forex charges on currency notes exchange in 2026 – i.e make it super transparent & affordable for consumers.
entries.signal: Niyo is aggressively expanding beyond card-based forex into physical currency exchange via "Niyo Express" home delivery/pickup, directly competing in a traditionally opaque market segment; positioning transparency as core brand promise across forex services (cards + notes).
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes forex transparency and home convenience are major consumer pain points; they see currency notes exchange as a natural adjacent market where Niyo's zero-markup model can disrupt incumbents.

entries.quote: AI is dramatically improving execution quality, speed, and precision. But the real differentiator is still how teams think. Our design team has built incredible AI-powered tools, plugins, and workflows that have fundamentally changed how we work.
entries.signal: Niyo is investing in AI-first capabilities in core operations (design, product), signaling a shift toward AI-driven competitive advantage in fintech product development and execution.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Niyo is building AI infrastructure as a strategic differentiator in product quality and speed-to-market.

entries.quote: What we did to high forex charges on cards way back in 2018 by introducing 'zero forex' cards, we will do the same to high forex charges on currency notes exchange in 2026 - i.e make it super transparent & affordable for consumers.
entries.signal: Niyo expanding beyond forex cards into physical currency exchange with home delivery/pickup (Niyo Express), positioning as transparent alternative to traditional forex outlets; extending zero-forex value proposition to cash-based travel segment.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Niyo sees forex exchange (physical + digital) as a core strategic lever with 2026 as execution year; betting on transparency and margin compression to disrupt incumbent forex players; investing in on-ground network (9 stores, target 50 branches) alongside digital platform
